title: Eluru canal chokes with garbage; municipal authorities term it a temporary problem
summary: Of the three canals and a rivulet that flow through the city, Bandar and Ryves canals do not require much cleaning, while the Budameru rivulet and Eluru canal carry a lot of filth

title: Report conflict in West Asia with utmost caution, says Pinarayi Vijayan
summary: He says it is a time for the media to exercise restraint and demonstrate a sense of deep responsibility in covering the unfolding crisis as news relating to the conflict could induce fear and anxiety among the relatives of Keralite expatriates

title: New retaining wall along right margin of Krishna river to protect 20,000 people from floods
summary: Nara Lokesh likely to lay foundation stone for the project on March 9; proposal, worth ₹294 crore, was approved in January 2025

title: Madras High Court grants relief to Panneerselvam, H. Raja, ‘Bussy’ Anand in different criminal cases
summary: Justice A.D. Jagadish Chandira quashes four criminal cases booked against former Chief Minister, modifies BJP leader’s bail condition and extends interim relief to TVK general secretary

title: Speaker reserves verdict on disqualification petition against Srihari; Danam Nagender seeks time to appear for final hearing
summary: Speaker Prasad Kumar already discussed petitions against 8 BRS legislators

title: Police department launches self-defense training for girls  ahead of International Women’s Day
Who will succeed Deputy Chairman Harivansh in the Rajya Sabha?
summary: As senior Janata Dal-United (JD-U) leader Harivansh, retiring on April 9, has not been renominated by his party, speculation has begun on who will succeed him, and whether the government will be filling the position at all

title: Police arrest seven for burglary, chain-snatching and bike theft
